context7.instructions: External library documentation lookups. Use when doc-search doesn't have the library indexed.

chrome-devtools.instructions: Headless Chromium browser automation running in Docker.

chrome-devtools-visible.instructions: Visible Chrome browser on Windows host. Use /chrome-dev skill to start/stop.

supabase-solemd.instructions: SQL-based access to ALL project schemas (solemd, vocab, make, web, wiki, zotero). Query live schema first - it's authoritative.

supabase-umls.instructions: Query UMLS terminology data. Contains MRCONSO, MRREL, and semantic type tables.

code-search.instructions: CRITICAL: Use this for ALL code exploration. Search for code-search tools FIRST before any code task. Use semantic_search to find code by meaning, list_functions to find symbols, trace_callers/trace_callees for call graphs, get_file_context before editing files, get_dependents for impact analysis. NEVER use grep/rg/find - always use code-search MCP instead.

doc-search.instructions: Query external library documentation using hybrid search (BM25 + semantic). 30+ libraries indexed: React, Next.js, Supabase, Langfuse, FastAPI, Pydantic, etc. Use resolve-library-id to find library, then query-docs to search. For exact API names, use exactMatch=true. See /doc-search skill for full guide.
